name: Blocksquare
oneliner: EU real-estate tokenisation infrastructure that ties each on-chain token to a notarised property deed — ~$200M in tokenised RWA, 66 buildings across 29 countries.
finserv: MiCA-ready; DLT Pilot Regime compatible. White-label model licensed to real-estate operators across Europe; rights model tied to notarised deeds is the clearest in the fractional-RE category.
team: European founders with deep property-tech DNA; the legal-wrapper clarity around the deed-to-token link is their biggest differentiator.
thesis: Real estate is the single biggest asset class Caroline Federal wants tokenised for retail. Blocksquare's notarised-deed rights model is the differentiator — most competitors wave their hands at what the token actually entitles you to.
